title: Novi Sad Heat Wave
lead: A severe heat wave is affecting Novi Sad, with a Z-Score of +3.37. This event has reached a critical level with a score of 10.0/10.
body:
The current heat wave in Novi Sad is causing extremely high temperatures, with a CDD of 10.8 GG. 
 The relative humidity is relatively low at 26%, but the wind speed of 11.5 km/h is not providing much relief. 
 The HDD is 0.0 GG, indicating no heating degree days, and the focus is on cooling.
conclusion: Implement emergency heat wave protocols immediately.
